results.title: AI Trading Journal — The Journal That Thinks With You | SuperTrader
results.content:
Setup decay

### Know when your best setup stops working.

The AI tracks win rate per setup over rolling 30-day windows and alerts you when a winning setup starts losing its statistical edge. Know the difference between a bad week and a broken setup before it costs you another month.

How it works

## From first trade to first insight in minutes.

01

### Connect your broker (1,000+ supported) — trades flow in automatically

Link any of 1,000+ supported brokers in under 2 minutes. SuperTrader auto-syncs every fill the moment it closes — no manual entry, no spreadsheets, no CSV juggling. Prefer CSV? Drag and drop from Robinhood, IBKR, Webull, MetaTrader, or any other platform.

02

results.title: ‎SuperTrader: Trading Journal - Ratings & Reviews - App Store
results.content:
Ouretdaniels

  The app itself is amazing to track trades in daily, weekly and monthly p&l. I was looking for something easy but very informative and it was this! I highly recommend it. To add the customer service is A+.

  Developer Response

  Thanks a lot for the great feedback. More improvements are coming soon. Best,Mircea
 ### Deleted months of data

  aidinenenen

  I had been using supertrader for around 7 moths since august of 2025. No issues at all, until one day (today) 7 months of data was deleted. Just simply gone. It shows maybe 1 or 2 days from each month but the rest is just gone. Looking for different options now. I would still recommend the platform but make sure you take screenshots of your journal often because 85% of your journal might just disappear one day. [...] boring gam333

  it has an entire made up person that it shows you the app with to start. And at the beginning, it gives you the option to delete the data to track your own. But even after you delete the information it just continues to re-download the old information that it made up to show off the app. Completely unhelpful when you’re trying to track your own trades as it interrupts the information and gives you completely incorrect data from your own trades. On top of that, it changes the data every time you log out of it which again completely invalidate exactly what you’re trying to do which is track your own trades…. Very unpolished, hoping to see some hot fixes soon.

  Developer Response [...] Developer Response

  Hi there - I’m the founder of SuperTrader.I read your review personally, and I’m really sorry this happened. Losing months of trading data is unacceptable.We have not seen this as expected behavior in the app, which means something went wrong in your specific case and I want to investigate it directly and recover your data if at all possible. In many cases, the data isn’t permanently lost and we can restore it.Please reach out to me at mgiurca@supertrader.me with your account details. I’ll personally look into this and make sure it’s handled with priority, and offer you a full refund.
 ### Stopped working

  DeAngelo90s

results.title: ‎Trading Journal - supertrader+ App - App Store
results.content:
more

## Ratings & Reviews

### Trading Journal for new and experienced traders

I’ve really been enjoying this so far. For anyone new to journaling, this app makes it simple to build the habit. It’s intuitive, user-friendly, and presents your data in multiple formats to suit different learning styles.As a trading educator, I think new traders will especially appreciate the AI mentor feature. I tested it by uploading a chart, and the feedback was both accurate and insightful. The pre-trading checklist is another standout feature that helps me stay disciplined and approach my trading and tracking in a systematic way.I also like that you can either manually enter trades or import them from a variety of brokers, which makes getting started quick and seamless. [...] Supercharge your trading performance with supertrader+ -> The #1 Trading Journal for Forex, Crypto, Stocks, & Commodities. Auto-import trades and track your profitability
TOP REASONS WHY 10,000+ TRADERS LOVE SUPERTRADER+
• Track Every Trade with Zero Effort: Forget manual logging. supertrader+ offers 1-click imports from your favorite brokers — Robinhood, Coinbase, Thinkorswim, Interactive Brokers, and more. Spend less time tracking, more time trading.
• AI-Driven Insights in Real-Time: supertrader+ uses cutting-edge AI analytics to identify profitable patterns, optimize your strategy, and uncover hidden opportunities before anyone else. [...] • Automate & Scale Your Success: supertrader+ takes care of the heavy lifting with automated journaling. Track unlimited trades across stocks, forex, crypto, and commodities — all in one seamless dashboard.
• Web Version for Seamless Access: Use supertrader+ anywhere — on desktop or mobile. The web version syncs effortlessly with the mobile app, giving you complete control over your trading data.
THE MOST ADVANCED TRADING JOURNAL YOU CAN GET
• 1-Click Auto Import: With auto import built into supertrader+, logging trades is effortless. Your journal updates in seconds — no clicks, no spreadsheets.
